system.description: Requires Muscle-Lift Expertise. Reach 20 feet / Long Reach. Total Success may restrain or knock back 5 feet. May exceed damage cap up to 7d10.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 5: Equipment and Goods
